title: I stopped trying to predict the market with AI and used it to filter trades instead
author: Disastrous_Hotel_574
selftext:
At first I thought AI would help me predict better entries.

It didn’t.

What it actually did was highlight my worst trades.

Looked back at my history:

\- early entries  

\- weak breakouts  

\- no real confirmation  

Classic stuff.

So I changed approach.

Instead of using AI to predict,  

I used it to filter:

\- no structure → no trade  

\- no confirmation → no trade  

That alone improved my results.

Less trades. Better trades.

The hard part is staying consistent manually.

So I built a small tool that scans charts and flags only valid setups.

No guessing. Just rules.

If you’re building or testing similar ideas:  

https://herculmarket.com
